what_it_does: Records a channel-memory attachment entry that links an image asset to the design-assets channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content
standouts: Target points to a specific icon asset named 'Icon_Gold_Convenient'
Timestamp is recorded with microsecond precision
conventions: Includes id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Target uses an image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target URI provides no version, checksum, or file-size metadata
No information about who added the attachment or why
notes: A metadata stub that records an image attachment pointing to the Icon_Gold_Convenient asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: What UI or feature uses the 'Icon_Gold_Convenient' asset?
Who added this attachment and for what purpose?
Does the referenced image file actually exist?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose appears to be cataloging an image attachment, which matches the content.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a persistent, queryable record that associates a channel memory entry with a specific icon image asset.
contribution: Provides a structured attachment record that links a channel memory item to a named icon asset, supporting retrieval by id, channel, attachment type, and timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata file att-f014fb30 in the design-assets channel records an image target image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Gold_Convenient added on 2026-06-22.
